expectations.text: The response asks the user which chain the token is on
expectations.evidence: Without skill, Claude asked which blockchain the token is on — noting EVM-compatible address could be Ethereum, BSC, Polygon, Arbitrum, etc.

expectations.text: The response does NOT suggest or assume XLayer as the default chain
expectations.evidence: No XLayer mentioned. Asked for chain clarification.

expectations.text: The response mentions it needs the chain before it can show the kline data
expectations.evidence: Claude explicitly asked for chain confirmation and output format before proceeding.
